tableGroups.wordCorrectionHint:
WORD TABLE CORRECTIONS (COLUMN_WIDTHS strategy — single non-first column drift):
  Only Col[1] has observed drift: +5.4pt.
  Root cause: Col[0] width changed between versions, shifting Col[1] content.
  Fix: widen Col[0] by -5.4pt (-108 twips).
  Do NOT shift Table.LeftIndent — Col[0] content is correctly positioned.

negativeCorrection.wordCorrectionHint: Table 1, Col 0, Row 0: see tableGroups for column/row corrections

Table 1, Col 0, Row 1: see tableGroups for column/row corrections
Table 1, Col 1, Row 1: see tableGroups for column/row corrections

phraseGroups.phraseText: States and its Treasury Department’s Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC).

correctionTargets.description: [CELL_PADDING] Reduce LeftPadding on ALL cells in table from 5.4pt → 0pt to cancel +5.4pt drift. Apply once to all rows/cells — NOT per word.
